title: Unused local variables and functions should be removed
description: If a local variable or a local function is declared but not used, it is dead code and should be removed. Doing so will improve maintainability because developers will not wonder what the variable or function is used for. What is the potential impact? An unused variable or local function usually occurs because some logic is no longer required after a code change.
recommendation: Remove the problematic code and refactor as needed.

checks.message: Remove unused local variable or function
